## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Validation

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `mypy src/cleantext_studio`
- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] Relevant documentation, translation, or screenshot checks

## Safety and compatibility

- [ ] No API key, private document, local path, build output, or binary is included.
- [ ] Existing cleanup behavior is unchanged, or a focused regression test explains the intentional change.
- [ ] UI changes include a privacy-safe screenshot when useful.
